channel.title: GitHub Perl Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Perl in GitHub

item.title: Perl/perl5
item.description: 🐪 The Perl programming language

item.title: sullo/nikto
item.description: Nikto web server scanner

item.title: brendangregg/FlameGraph
item.description: Stack trace visualizer

item.title: AlDanial/cloc
item.description: cloc counts blank lines, comment lines, and physical lines of source code in many programming languages.

item.title: rjbs/Email-Sender
item.description: a perl library for sending email

item.title: major/MySQLTuner-perl
item.description: MySQLTuner is a script written in Perl that will assist you with your MySQL configuration and make recommendations for increased performance and stability.

item.title: LMS-Community/slimserver
item.description: Server for Squeezebox and compatible players. This server is also called Lyrion Music Server.

item.title: kazuho/p5-Server-Starter
item.description: a superdaemon for hot-deploying server programs

item.title: ocpi/ocpi
item.description: The Open Charge Point Interface (OCPI) allows for a scalable, automated roaming setup between Charge Point Operators and e-Mobility Service Providers. It supports authorisation, charge point information exchange (incl transaction events), charge detail record exchange and finally, the exchange of smart-charging commands between parties.

item.title: Difegue/LANraragi
item.description: Web application for archival and reading of manga/doujinshi. Lightweight and Docker-ready for NAS/servers.

item.title: fusioninventory/fusioninventory-agent
item.description: FusionInventory Agent

item.title: Gaius-Augustus/BRAKER
item.description: BRAKER is a pipeline for fully automated prediction of protein coding gene structures with GeneMark-ES/ET/EP/ETP and AUGUSTUS in novel eukaryotic genomes

item.title: glpi-project/glpi-agent
item.description: GLPI Agent

item.title: centreon/centreon-plugins
item.description: Collection of standard plugins to discover and gather cloud-to-edge metrics and status across your whole IT infrastructure.

item.title: trinityrnaseq/trinityrnaseq
item.description: Trinity RNA-Seq de novo transcriptome assembly

item.title: Ensembl/ensembl-vep
item.description: The Ensembl Variant Effect Predictor predicts the functional effects of genomic variants

item.title: owasp-modsecurity/ModSecurity-nginx
item.description: ModSecurity v3 Nginx Connector

item.title: Zimbra/zm-build
item.description: zm-build for Zimbra Collaboration Suite, FOSS Edition

item.title: yaml/yaml-test-suite
item.description: Comprehensive, language independent Test Suite for YAML

item.title: inverse-inc/packetfence
item.description: PacketFence is a fully supported, trusted, Free and Open Source network access control (NAC) solution. Boasting an impressive feature set including a captive-portal for registration and remediation, centralized wired and wireless management, powerful BYOD management options, 802.1X support, layer-2 isolation of problematic devices; PacketFence c…

item.title: darold/ora2pg
item.description: Ora2Pg is a free tool used to migrate an Oracle database to a PostgreSQL compatible schema. It connects your Oracle database, scan it automatically and extracts its structure or data, it then generates SQL scripts that you can load into PostgreSQL.
